text: I feel a quiet anticipation as I wander these spaces, one seemingly prepared for discussion or presentation, the other devoted to contemplation and inquiry. The empty chairs in the first room evoke the latent potential of ideas yet to be shared, while the vibrancy and intellectual energy of the R+D exhibit ignite my curiosity. I sense I am suspended between the promise of dialogue and the urge to explore new concepts, lingering in a state of thoughtful expectation and possibility.
